title: Typical AI Cluster Networking Configuration and TCO
title_translation: 典型AI集群组网配置与总拥有成本

paragraphs.source: A typical AI Cluster has three main networking fabrics, back-end, front-end and out of band management fabric. The most heavily utilized and technically demanding network fabric is the back-end fabric. The back-end fabric is used for scale-out communications between GPUs to communicate with one another and exchange data in collective operations to parallelize training and inference. Back-end networks typically use the InfiniBand or Ethernet protocols.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: A typical AI Cluster has three main networking fabrics, back-end, front-end and out of band management fabric. The most heavily utilized and technically demanding network fabric is the back-end fabric. The back-end fabric is used for scale-out communications between GPUs to communicate with one another and exchange data in collective operations to parallelize training and inference. Back-end networks typically use the InfiniBand or Ethernet protocols.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: A typical AI Cluster has three main networking fabrics, back-end, front-end and out of band management fabric. The most heavily utilized and technically demanding network fabric is the back-end fabric. The back-end fabric is used for scale-out communications between GPUs to communicate with one another and exchange data in collective operations to parallelize training and inference. Back-end networks typically use the InfiniBand or Ethernet protocols.

default.text: 典型的 AI 集群包含三大主要网络平面：后端网络、前端网络以及带外管理网络。其中，后端网络利用率最高，技术要求也最为苛刻。后端网络主要用于 GPU 间的横向扩展通信。GPU 依托该网络相互连接，并在集合通信操作中交换数据，进而实现训练与推理的并行化。后端网络通常采用 InfiniBand 或以太网协议。

paragraphs.source: Because of its demanding nature, the back-end network accounts for a dominant share of total networking cost and power, representing 85% of networking cost and 86% of networking power for 3-layer GB300 NVL72 clusters deployed on InfiniBand using Nvidia’s X800-Q3400 back-end switches. CPO-based switches and networking solutions can be used in both the back-end and front-end network, but we think that the focus for deployment at this stage will be in the back-end network. Readers can find much more details on back-end network topology, port, switch, and transceiver counts in our Optical Boogeyman Article from 2024 as well as in our AI Networking Model. Those that would like to understand total networking cost of ownership can read our AI Neocloud Anatomy and Playbook article.

inline_elements.text: AI Neocloud Anatomy and Playbook article

CPO-based switches and networking solutions can be used in both the back-end and front-end network, but we think that the focus for deployment at this stage will be in the back-end network. default.text: 后端网络对性能要求极高，因此在整体网络成本和功耗中占据绝对大头。以采用英伟达（NVIDIA）X800-Q3400 后端交换机、基于 InfiniBand 部署的三层 GB300 NVL72 集群为例，其后端网络占总网络成本的 85%，功耗占比高达 86%。尽管基于 CPO（共封装光学）的交换机与网络方案在前端和后端网络中均可使用，但我们认为现阶段的部署重心仍将集中在后端网络。关于后端网络拓扑、端口、交换机及光模块数量的详尽细节，读者可参阅我们 2024 年发布的《Optical Boogeyman》一文 以及 AI 网络模型。若想深入了解整体网络总拥有成本，请阅读我们的 《AI 新型云厂商剖析与实操指南》一文。
default.tokenized_text: 后端网络对性能要求极高，因此在整体网络成本和功耗中占据绝对大头。以采用英伟达（NVIDIA）X800-Q3400 后端交换机、基于 InfiniBand 部署的三层 GB300 NVL72 集群为例，其后端网络占总网络成本的 85%，功耗占比高达 86%。尽管基于 CPO（共封装光学）的交换机与网络方案在前端和后端网络中均可使用，但我们认为现阶段的部署重心仍将集中在后端网络。关于后端网络拓扑、端口、交换机及光模块数量的详尽细节，读者可参阅我们 [[[LINK_1|2024 年发布的《Optical Boogeyman》一文]]] 以及 [[[LINK_2|AI 网络模型]]]。若想深入了解整体网络总拥有成本，请阅读我们的 [[[LINK_3|《AI 新型云厂商剖析与实操指南》一文]]]。

paragraphs.source: Nvidia’s Optical Boogeyman – NVL72, Infiniband Scale Out, 800G & 1.6T Ramp - Dylan Patel and Daniel Nishball · March 25, 2024

paragraphs.source: Zooming out – networking cost is the second largest component of total AI cluster cost behind the AI server itself. In a GB300 NVL72 Cluster with a 3-Layer InfiniBand network, this stands at 15% of total cluster cost, reaching 18% of total cluster cost for a 4-Layer network. Optical transceivers are a significant portion of this cost, accounting for 60% of networking cost for a 3-Layer network when using the relatively more expensive Nvidia LinkX Transceivers. They also consume 45% of total networking power for a 3-Layer network.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Zooming out – networking cost is the second largest component of total AI cluster cost behind the AI server itself. In a GB300 NVL72 Cluster with a 3-Layer InfiniBand network, this stands at 15% of total cluster cost, reaching 18% of total cluster cost for a 4-Layer network. Optical transceivers are a significant portion of this cost, accounting for 60% of networking cost for a 3-Layer network when using the relatively more expensive Nvidia LinkX Transceivers. They also consume 45% of total networking power for a 3-Layer network.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Zooming out – networking cost is the second largest component of total AI cluster cost behind the AI server itself. In a GB300 NVL72 Cluster with a 3-Layer InfiniBand network, this stands at 15% of total cluster cost, reaching 18% of total cluster cost for a 4-Layer network. Optical transceivers are a significant portion of this cost, accounting for 60% of networking cost for a 3-Layer network when using the relatively more expensive Nvidia LinkX Transceivers. They also consume 45% of total networking power for a 3-Layer network.

default.text: 放眼全局，网络成本是 AI 集群总成本的第二大组成部分，仅次于 AI 服务器本身。在采用三层 InfiniBand 网络的 GB300 NVL72 集群中，网络成本占集群总成本的 15%；若采用四层网络，这一比例将达到 18%。光模块在这笔开销中占据大头。如果在三层网络中使用相对昂贵的英伟达（NVIDIA）LinkX 光模块，其成本将占到网络总成本的 60%。此外，在三层网络架构下，光模块还消耗了 45% 的网络总功耗。

paragraphs.source: The greater the number of GPUs in an AI cluster, the more likely it is that more networking layers will be needed. Going from a two-layer to a three-layer network and beyond means higher costs and a greater power budget. CPO can both help reduce power and cost holding number of layers constant, and can reduce total power and cost requirements by expanding the number of GPUs that can be connected on a network of a given number of layers.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The greater the number of GPUs in an AI cluster, the more likely it is that more networking layers will be needed. Going from a two-layer to a three-layer network and beyond means higher costs and a greater power budget. CPO can both help reduce power and cost holding number of layers constant, and can reduce total power and cost requirements by expanding the number of GPUs that can be connected on a network of a given number of layers.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The greater the number of GPUs in an AI cluster, the more likely it is that more networking layers will be needed. Going from a two-layer to a three-layer network and beyond means higher costs and a greater power budget. CPO can both help reduce power and cost holding number of layers constant, and can reduce total power and cost requirements by expanding the number of GPUs that can be connected on a network of a given number of layers.

default.text: AI 集群中的 GPU 数量越多，往往越需要增加网络层级。网络架构从两层扩展至三层甚至更多层，意味着更高的成本与更大的功耗预算。CPO 具备双重优势：一方面，在保持网络层级不变的前提下，它有助于降低功耗与成本；另一方面，在给定层级的网络中，它能增加可连接的 GPU 数量，从而降低整体的功耗与成本需求。
